headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid RVTY and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Revvity’s 14.9% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 5.6%, and its stock price has climbed to $112.79 per share. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Revvity Expands Signals AI With Anthropic Claude Integration
summary: RVTY expands Signals AI through Anthropic's MCP ecosystem, giving scientists secure Claude access to connected R&D data and scientific context.
